signals.title: DOE emergency orders are incurring additional costs. What are the benefits?
signals.summary: Some of the generating units have operated during tight grid conditions and may have contributed to reliability. Keeping them running costs about $550 million a year, the Sierra Club says.

signals.title: NASA’s inspector general warns launch sites nearing capacity
signals.summary:
A report by NASA’s inspector general is the latest to highlight the problems that the increasing number of launches is posing to spaceports. 
 The post  NASA’s inspector general warns launch sites nearing capacity  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Trump keeps turning Republican wins into loyalty tests — and political liabilities
signals.summary: President Donald Trump’s moves on housing, FISA, Iran and Washington projects are creating new headaches for Republicans trying to show voters they can govern.

signals.title: U.S. crude oil falls below $70, resuming losses after attack on cargo ship near Oman
signals.summary: Oil extended declines on Friday, with markets focused any further breakthroughs in the Middle East conflict, while digesting a flurry of news from the region.

signals.title: [13F] Scion Asset Mgmt (Burry) — nuovo filing 2023-08-10
signals.summary: Controlla il filing per vedere le nuove posizioni aperte/aumentate.

signals.title: Trump meets munitions makers amid push to replenish weapons stockpiles
signals.summary: Pentagon negotiators are pressing contractors to move much faster to boost output.

signals.title: White House asks Congress for $87.6 billion, mostly for Iran war
signals.summary: The request includes $67.15 billion for the military, including $21 billion for munitions and to strengthen the U.S. industrial base.

signals.title: The Pentagon’s research infrastructure is ‘deteriorating,’ study finds
signals.summary: Pentagon research has been hampered by backlogged security clearances, limited funds to build or refurbish labs and a slow and difficult hiring process.

signals.title: Coinbase's Base blockchain resumes after two-hour outage disrupted network
Deployable reserves shrinking as coal, gas forced outage rates rise: NERC
signals.summary: Coal and gas generation saw a respective 39.8 TWh and 19.1 TWh increase in unavailable energy in 2025, the North American Electric Reliability Corp. said.

signals.title: A month into EDAM, the data already shows two very different grids
signals.summary: The new Western day-ahead market is starting to show where resource mixes, operating constraints and carbon policies create fundamentally different economic outcomes.

signals.title: Texas landowners seek pause in $2B, 765-kV transmission line case over notice concerns
signals.summary: The Permian Basin power line request says property owners were not properly notified after route changes. The build-out is tied to growing ERCOT grid needs.

signals.title: Democrats probe Trump's troubled $16 million reflecting pool renovation
signals.summary: President Donald Trump has attempted to spruce up Washington in advance of the country's 250th anniversary.

signals.title: Judge blocks Trump's rule limiting federal student loans for certain grad school borrowers
signals.summary: A federal judge temporarily blocked Trump's limits on how much certain graduate students can borrow. That policy was set to go into effect July 1.

signals.title: Judge says lawsuit against Trump DOJ 'anti-weaponization' fund will proceed
signals.summary: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche originally set up the fund as part of a settlement of a lawsuit by President Donald Trump against the IRS.

signals.title: Chevron says no quick fix for gas prices as Trump takes on Big Oil: ‘It’s going to take time’
signals.summary: Her comments come shortly after President Donald Trump ordered an investigation into Big Oil, accusing them of "gouging" consumers.

signals.title: Trump pledges rapid U.S. response for Venezuela after historic earthquakes kill hundreds
signals.summary: The swift U.S. offer of assistance reflects a degree of diplomatic realignment between the Trump administration and the Venezuelan interim government.

signals.title: NBA targets Asian resurgence with technology and talent push
signals.summary: Southeast Asia has emerged as one of the NBA's fastest-growing markets for fan engagement, making the region a focal point for both player development and business expansion.

signals.title: Binance to stop providing services to European clients after failing to obtain license: Financial Times
signals.summary: All crypto companies have to obtain a license under the bloc's Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation by July 1, or risk penalties.

signals.title: Gen. Christopher Donahue to unexpectedly relinquish command of Army Europe and Africa
signals.summary: U.S. Army Gen. Christopher Donahue will unexpectedly relinquish command next week after just 18 months in the role, the Pentagon confirmed Wednesday.

signals.title: 3 home energy providers offer 16.8 GW of distributed capacity to utilities, hyperscalers
signals.summary: An executive for Sunrun said active “distributed power plant” programs like one in Puerto Rico underscore the resource’s potential.

signals.title: Platte River, EnergyHub partner to deploy 39-MW Colorado VPP
signals.summary: Platte River Power Authority plans to achieve 19 MW from customer-owned distributed resources by 2030, with the first virtual power plant programs launching this summer.

signals.title: Grid operators making ‘significant progress’ on generator interconnection reform: AEU
signals.summary: However, there isn’t yet evidence that interconnection requests are being processed more quickly, according to Advanced Energy United.

signals.summary:

signals.title: Ukraine’s top strike-drone maker moves into ballistic missile defense
signals.summary: Fire Point's drones already fly most of Kyiv's strikes inside Russia. With Germany's Hensoldt, the company is now building Freyja, a homegrown alternative.

signals.title: Ukraine’s newest strike weapon drifts into Russia on the wind
signals.summary: The U.S. and Russia are fielding the same balloons used by Ukraine that bait air defenses and now launch missiles.

signals.title: Philippines deploys US-made Triton naval drones in its western waters to scout for intruders
signals.summary: The transfer comes after the military revealed that China discreetly deployed a 6x6 meter floating platform equipped with an antenna at Scarborough Shoal.

signals.title: Europe’s defense build-up depends on getting partnerships right
signals.summary: One pattern is worth watching: Partnership activity is not spreading evenly across the market; it is coalescing around a handful of industrial platforms.

signals.title: Chan Zuckerberg Initiative's Biohub to open new rare disease funding round
signals.summary: Chan Zuckerberg Initiative's Biohub will offer new grants to the rare disease community while expanding its AI drug repurposing partnership with Every Cure.

signals.title: FedEx Freight takes a step forward in its independent journey. Here's why we like the stock
signals.summary: FedEx Freight had plenty of encouraging things to say on its first earnings call as a standalone company.

signals.title: Chicago Fed President Goolsbee says inflation is too high; Williams sees price pressures easing
signals.summary: In a live CNBC interview from his home district, Goolsbee declined to speculate on where he thinks interest rates are headed.

signals.title: As Social Security faces trust fund depletion, some Washington lawmakers call for taxing high earners
signals.summary: High earners may only contribute Social Security payroll taxes for part of the year. As the program faces funding woes, some lawmakers say that should change.

signals.title: Bond ETF flows surge in hunt for yield: 'Market sniffing out something here,' says BlackRock exec
signals.summary: Bond investors are abandoning aggregate benchmarks in favor of a broad mix of fixed-income investments to maximize yield with the stock market on edge.

signals.title: GM reveals 2027 GMC Sierra pickup with new V-8 engines, redesigned styling
signals.summary: The new GMC Sierra trucks are crucial to GM's sales and earnings, especially highly profitable luxury Denali and off-road AT4 models.

signals.title: Microsoft lifts price of Xbox consoles due to soaring component costs
signals.summary: Microsoft said it's increasing the price of Xbox game consoles after Apple announced price hikes for MacBooks and iPads.

signals.title: Supreme Court limits Roundup cancer suits against Bayer's Monsanto
signals.summary: Glyphosate, used in Roundup weedkiller, is the most commonly utilized herbicide in agriculture, and it has long been linked to cancer claims.

signals.title: JPMorgan names Doug Petno and Troy Rohrbaugh co-presidents as longtime exec Marianne Lake exits
signals.summary: The moves would appear to make Doug Petno and Troy Rohrbaugh the most obvious possible successors to JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon.

signals.title: Core inflation rate hit 3.4% in May, highest since October 2023, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
signals.summary: The personal consumption expenditures price index was expected to show a 4.1% annual increase.

signals.title: Wendy's turns lower as meme rally fails to extend to a second day
signals.summary: The stock's volatile run appeared largely disconnected from company fundamentals and instead reflected a burst of social media enthusiasm.

signals.title: TikTok and YouTube are reinventing sports viewership. Broadcasters are taking note
signals.summary: Leagues, teams and media networks are increasingly meeting younger fans on social media as platforms like TikTok, Roblox and YouTube capture most of their time.

signals.title: GameStop’s CEO just sacrificed a $35 billion pay package. Here’s how it could impact his effort to buy eBay
signals.summary: Ryan Cohen has shared few details on how he'll move forward with his $56 billion offer for eBay since the company rejected the proposal in May.

signals.title: Iraq piles pressure on OPEC over quota dispute after UAE exit
signals.summary: Reuters reported that though Iraq had considered leaving OPEC, the ​current plan is to remain a member of the group while seeking a higher output quota.

signals.title: Darden Restaurants earnings beat estimates but Olive Garden growth weakens
signals.summary: Same-store sales growth at Darden's fine-dining restaurants and Olive Garden fell short of expectations.

signals.title: U.S. giving topped $600 billion for the first time last year. Megadonors and bequests are to thank
signals.summary: The stock market rally turbocharged charitable giving in 2025, but primarily from wealthy donors.

signals.summary: The deal puts Poland in line to become the first country on NATO’s eastern flank to acquire the Shield AI-made drone.

signals.title: US, UK, France, Germany raise alarm about Chinese patrols off eastern Taiwan
signals.summary: The countries said Chinese patrols off the coast of Taiwan threaten regional stability and freedom of navigation.

signals.title: Airstrike killed senior ISIS commander in Syria, CENTCOM says
signals.summary: A senior Islamic State leader was killed by an airstrike last week, Central Command announced on Wednesday.

signals.title: Germany scraps F126 frigate program, pivots to MEKO warships amid cost and contractor chaos
signals.summary: Germany Navy leaders have already blessed the fallback ships as capable of meeting NATO capability requirements, but an alliance deadline looms.

signals.title: Tank maker KNDS plans stock market listing, Germany to buy 40% stake
signals.summary: The firm showed a proposed battle tank at Eurosatory defense exhibition in Paris boasting a French turret and gun mounted on a German Leopard 2 chassis.

signals.title: US Senate joins House in voting to halt Iran war
signals.summary: It marks the first time both chambers approved directing a president to remove armed forces from hostilities since the War Powers Act was adopted in 1973.

signals.title: US Army tests fire control software that helps moving vehicles kill drones
signals.summary: The Army has successfully tested software designed to help vehicle-mounted weapons shoot down drones while both the target and the vehicle are moving.

signals.title: Frustrating Israel, fiber-optic killer drone technology has arrived in southern Lebanon
signals.summary: Analysts believe that any military engaged in conflict will, in one form or another, encounter technologies first seen in Ukraine.

signals.title: India’s three new naval ships boost maritime firepower
signals.summary: The country has made strides in constructing complex naval platforms but remains dependent on foreign suppliers for key technologies.
